name: HEX_JOB_PREPROCESS_RANGE
description: The table stores the status of preprocess chunk progress.

columns.Name: PREPROCESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the JOB_ID from the HEX_JOBS table.

columns.Name: PARENT_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the parent job id for the current job.

columns.Name: CHUNK_PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the current processing status of the chunk.

columns.Name: CHUNK_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The column indicates the number of the chunk being processed.

columns.Name: CHUNK_THREAD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The column indicates the thread number processing the current chunk.

columns.Name: THREAD_ESS_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the process request id for the thread.

columns.Name: SEQ_NO
columns.Comments: The column indicates the unique sequence number associated with each chunk.

columns.Name: START_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the start value within the range.

columns.Name: END_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the end value within the range.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the processing type. Valid values are PREPROCESS, PROCESS and POSTPROCESS.

columns.Name: GROUP_TAG_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the value reference for the parent child link.

columns.Name: GROUP_TAG_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The column indicates the number reference for the parent child link.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.
